name: Abdomen CT With Contrast - GI
description: Abdomen CT with contrast focused on gastrointestinal evaluation

findings.technique: CT of the abdomen and pelvis with oral and intravenous contrast was performed.

sections.name: Stomach
sections.content: The stomach [is appropriately distended / shows normal wall thickening / no mass or filling defect]. Gastric wall enhancement is [normal / uniform].

sections.name: Small Bowel
sections.content:
Small bowel loops [are not dilated / show normal caliber / no transition point identified]. Wall thickening [is not present / no abnormal enhancement]. No bowel obstruction.
No free air or significant free fluid.

sections.name: Colon
sections.content: The colon [is appropriately distended / shows no colonic wall thickening / no mass or filling defect]. No bowel obstruction. No diverticulitis.

sections.name: Appendix
sections.content: The appendix [is not identified / is normal in appearance / no appendicitis].

sections.name: Peritoneum
sections.content: No free air. No significant free fluid. No peritoneal nodules or masses identified.

impression:
1. [No acute bowel abnormality / No bowel obstruction or inflammation].
2. [No free air or free fluid / No acute intra-abdominal process].
3. [Normal study / Recommend clinical correlation].
